framework_instructions:
SUPABASE IMPORTS: `import { supabaseAdmin } from '@/lib/supabase'` for server-side (API routes). Never use `createClient` or default import. Client-side components must fetch via `/api/...` routes, NOT import supabaseAdmin.
SUPABASE QUERIES: Use `supabaseAdmin.from('table_name').select(...)` — never use `from<Type>(...)` generics. If you need typed results, cast after the query.
TYPESCRIPT STRICT MODE: When iterating over Record<UnionType, T>, always cast keys: `(key as TaskStatus)` or use typed arrays. Never use a plain `string` to index a Record<UnionType, T>.
LUCIDE ICONS: Use exact export names — `GithubIcon` (not GitHub or GitHubIcon), `ExternalLink`, `Search`, `X`, `ClipboardList`.
API ROUTES: Use `NextRequest` and `NextResponse` from 'next/server'. Route params use `{ params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }` pattern with `const { id } = await params;`.
This project uses Next.js 16 with Tailwind CSS v4 (dark: prefix classes). Use 'use client' for interactive components.
SUSPENSE WRAPPER — DO NOT REMOVE: Any page using `useSearchParams()` MUST be wrapped in a `<Suspense>` boundary. The pattern is: `export default function PageWrapper()` returns `<Suspense><ActualPage/></Suspense>`, and the actual page is a non-exported function. If the file already has this pattern, KEEP IT. Import `Suspense` from 'react'.
USEEFFECT DEPENDENCIES: When modifying a file, preserve ALL existing useEffect dependency arrays exactly. Do not drop dependencies.
POSTGREST: When multiple FKs exist between tables, use `!column_name` to specify which FK. Syntax: `tasks:tasks!project_id(count)`.
RECHARTS TYPING: When using custom label, content, or shape components with Recharts (Bar, Pie, Line, etc.), always type props as `any` and cast the component with `as any`. Example: `content={(props: any) => <text>...</text>}` or `<Bar label={CustomLabel as any} />`. Recharts ContentType is incompatible with JSX function components — do NOT try to satisfy the type, just cast it.
